news.headline: North Carolina Community College System launches Boost program; aims to train workforce for economic growth.
news.summary: In Raleigh, North Carolina, on February 6, 2025, an accelerated college-to-career program was unveiled with the goal of preparing the workforce essential for enhancing the economic growth of the state. The North Carolina Community College System (NCCCS) introduced this initiative to address the state's increasing demand for skilled professionals. This program aims to provide specialized training to individuals, equipping them with the necessary skills and knowledge to contribute to North Carolina's economic success. The program highlights emphasize the importance of meeting workforce demands and enhancing job opportunities for the residents.

news.headline: Effective Fed Funds rate 4.33% February 5th vs 4.33% February 4th
Amerisure upgrades systems with Guidewire, deploying PolicyCenter and BillingCenter for enhanced business agility in Michigan.
news.summary: In Farmington Hills, Michigan and San Mateo, California, Amerisure has effectively implemented PolicyCenter and BillingCenter as its new platforms for managing policy administration, underwriting, and billing. This development marks a significant step for the company in streamlining its operations and enhancing efficiency.

news.headline: Lucid Diagnostics to participate in BTIG conference; Lucid is a cancer prevention diagnostics company.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, Lucid Diagnostics Inc. (Nasdaq: LUCD), a cancer prevention medical diagnostics company under PAVmed Inc. (Nasdaq: PAVM), revealed its involvement in the 12th Annual BTIG MedTech event. This event showcases innovations in the medical technology sector and serves as a platform for companies to present their advancements. Lucid, as a commercial-stage entity, aims to contribute to the field of cancer prevention through its diagnostic solutions. This news highlights the company's commitment to advancing healthcare and potentially impacting the sector with its offerings.

news.headline: Oklahoma invests in advanced air mobility infrastructure, paving way for long-range drone flights. ODAA executes first contract.
news.summary: Oklahoma City, February 6, 2025 - The Oklahoma Department of Aerospace and Aeronautics (ODAA) has taken a significant step in advancing the state's autonomous flight capabilities by finalizing a contract for their inaugural long-range drone flights. This initiative signifies the state's commitment to solidifying its position as a leader in autonomous flight technology. The selection process has been concluded, positioning ODAA to embark on this groundbreaking journey.

news.headline: Universal Technical Institute (NYSE: UTI) beats Q1 earnings with 40 cents per share (vs 18 cents estimate) and $201.43 million in sales (vs $193.94 million estimate). CEO Jerome Grant optimistic about FY25 guidance.
news.summary: Universal Technical Institute, Inc. (NYSE:UTI) exceeded expectations in its first-quarter financial report and subsequently raised its FY25 guidance. The company posted quarterly earnings of 40 cents per share, surpassing the estimated 18 cents per share by analysts. Quarterly sales totaled $201.43 million, also beating the analyst consensus of $193.94 million. Jerome Grant, CEO of Universal Technical Institute, Inc., attributed the success to the implementation of their growth, diversification, and optimization strategy. The company saw a 15% increase in consolidated revenue, an 11% growth in average full-time active students, and other notable improvements.

news.headline: Pinterest (NYSE:PINS) will report Q4 earnings on Feb. 6. Estimates show $0.65/share earnings and $1.14 billion revenue. Stock closed at $33.30.
news.summary: Pinterest, Inc. will be announcing its Q4 financial results on Feb 6 after market close. Analysts are forecasting earnings of 65 cents per share, up from 53 cents in the same period last year. The company is expected to report quarterly revenue of $1.14 billion, a growth from $981.26 million a year ago. In the previous quarter, Pinterest surpassed expectations with revenue hitting $898 million, while earnings were at four cents per share, lower than the anticipated seven cents per share. The stock closed at $33.30 on Wednesday, dropping by 0.3%. For more details, readers can find the full article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Inter & Co (NASDAQ: INTR) exceeded Q4 earnings estimates by 10% with an EPS of $0.11. More details at Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Inter & Co (NASDAQ: INTR) released its fourth-quarter earnings on February 6, 2025, at 07:05 AM. The company surpassed expected earnings by 10.0%, with an EPS of $0.11. For more details, check out the complete story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Arrow Electronics beat Q4 estimated earnings by 11% with EPS of $2.97 (vs $2.68). Revenue down $566M.
news.summary: Arrow Electronics (NYSE:ARW) released its Q4 earnings report on February 6, 2025, at 08:00 AM. The company surpassed earnings expectations by 11.0%, posting an EPS of $2.97 compared to the projected $2.68. Despite this, revenue saw a decrease of $566.00 million from the previous year. For further details on this news story, please refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Capital Clean Energy (NASDAQ:CCEC) exceeds Q4 earnings expectations by 3%, with EPS of $0.36. Reported on Feb 6, 2025.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025 at 07:30 AM, Capital Clean Energy (NASDAQ:CCEC) released its Q4 earnings report. The company surpassed earnings expectations by 3.0%, with an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.36. For detailed information, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: 1st Commercial Credit introduces QuickBooks® integration for invoice factoring, improving funding process. based in Austin, Texas.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on February 6, 2025, 1st Commercial Credit, LLC announced a new initiative to streamline funding processes. The company, a prominent provider of invoice factoring solutions for industries including staffing, manufacturing, distribution, and transportation, is introducing a QuickBooks® integration. This move aims to enhance efficiency in financial operations for businesses, marking a significant step in advancing funding opportunities.

news.headline: Rhino and Jetty merge to create largest security deposit insurance company, serving over 6 million rental units nationwide.
news.summary: A company resulting from the merger of Rhino and Jetty now serves more than 6 million rental units across the United States as of February 6, 2025. This combined entity provides renters with cost-effective alternatives to traditional security deposits during move-in. This merger has solidified their position as the leading providers of security deposit insurance in the market.

news.headline: True Food Kitchen collaborates with SZA to launch the SZA CZA Salad, supporting food equity. PHOENIX, Feb. 6, 2025.
news.summary: A popular dish, the revamped Kale Caesar Salad, has been launched with the aim of supporting SÜPRMARKT's goal of promoting food equity. Recently introduced by True Food Kitchen in Phoenix on Feb. 6, 2025, this initiative is aimed at making nutritious food affordable for everyone. The restaurant has collaborated to donate a portion of the proceeds towards SÜPRMARKT's cause, showcasing their commitment to this mission.

news.headline: The Prairie Dogz from Southern Alberta release a high-energy take on 'Country Roads'. Calgary, AB. Feb. 6, 2025.
news.summary: Calgary, Alberta - On February 6, 2025, the rock-country band The Prairie Dogz from Southern Alberta has channeled their wealth of experience into a dynamic new release. The band can be found on various platforms such as Spotify, YouTube, their website, Facebook, and Instagram. The new release showcases their signature high-energy sound and harmonious vocals. For more information, visit their social media pages and streaming platforms.

news.headline: New J-Code (J9161) issued for LYMPHIR by CMS effective April 1, 2025; FDA-approved for CTCL treatment.
news.summary: Effective starting April 1, 2025, the Permanent J-Code (J9161) will be in place for LYMPHIR, which has obtained approval from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA). This medication is specifically for treating adult patients suffering from relapsed or refractory Stage I-III cutaneous T-cell lymphoma (CTCL) after going through at least one prior systemic therapy.

news.headline: LPL Financial adds advisors Roskelley & Robertson from Ameriprise, managing $345M assets.
news.summary: On Feb. 6, 2025, LPL Financial LLC revealed the addition of financial advisors Jared Roskelley, CFP®, and Kyle Robertson, CFP®, from Jackson/Roskelley Wealth Advisors to their platforms. The advisors brought in around $345 million in assets under their management, covering advisory, brokerage, and retirement plans. They made the move from Ameriprise to join LPL Financial’s broker-dealer, Registered Investment Advisor (RIA), and custodial platforms to expand their services.

news.headline: Bitcoin and Ethereum dominate social media discussions amid crypto market volatility. Santiment data reveals interest in meme coin Dogelon Mars (ELON) due to speculation on Elon Musk's role.
news.summary: According to recent data from analytics provider Santiment, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH), and other cryptocurrencies are still major conversation topics on social media despite the high volatility in the market. Bitcoin, in particular, is the most discussed subject, with traders analyzing its price movements, institutional investments, and market trends. Discussions also touch on Bitcoin's reserves, market dominance, and its role in the broader financial landscape. On the other hand, the meme cryptocurrency Dogelon Mars (CRYPTO: ELON) has been gaining popularity primarily due to speculation surrounding the potential involvement of Elon Musk. Overall, these digital assets continue to attract significant attention and discussion on various social media platforms.

news.headline: Dassault Aviation: Shares and voting rights total 31 01 25.
Dr. Dempsey opens MDVIP-affiliated practice in Lee's Summit, Missouri with over 1,300 physicians in network.
news.summary: In an announcement on February 6, 2025, MDVIP, a leading provider of membership-based healthcare, unveiled that Herbert E. Dempsey, DO, a certified family physician in Kansas City, has joined their network. MDVIP currently boasts a nationwide network of more than 1,300 primary care physicians, solidifying its position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: CloudFabrix rebrands to Fabrix.ai, leading AI-driven ITOps solutions. Pioneering the Agentic AI Era. (Characters: 94)
news.summary: CloudFabrix, a company based in Pleasanton, California, has introduced a cutting-edge Operational Intelligence Platform designed for the era of agentic AI. This announcement was made on February 6, 2025. CloudFabrix is known for creating the Robotic Data Automation Fabric Platform and is recognized as a top leader in the Gigaom AIOps Radar report and the Enterprise Management Associates (EMA) Radar report. Their platform has been gaining attention for its advanced capabilities in the field of artificial intelligence and operational efficiency.

news.headline: Ford Bronco Sport partners with The Dyrt to enhance camping adventures in 2025 through three Title Partner integrations.
news.summary: In Portland, Oregon on February 6, 2025, an announcement was made regarding a collaboration between Ford Motor Company's Bronco Sport Spring campaign and The Dyrt. The partnership will feature three significant Title Partner integrations, including the State Parks Collection. This collaboration aims to drive outdoor exploration and provide support for Ford's campaign.

news.headline: Embraer hits record US$26.3B backlog in 4Q24, up 40% yoy. Commercial Aviation at US$10.2B, Executive Jets at US$7.4B. Deliveries: 75 aircraft in 4Q24, 206 in 2024.
news.summary: Embraer reported in 4Q24 that their organization-wide backlog reached a record high of US$26.3 billion, a 40%+ increase year-on-year. Commercial Aviation had a US$10.2 billion backlog, up 15% year-on-year, with a 1.6x book-to-bill ratio. Executive Jets reached a new high of US$7.4 billion backlog, up 65%+ quarter-on-quarter. Services & Support backlog was at US$4.6 billion, a 50%+ increase from 4Q23. Defense & Security saw a 67% year-on-year backlog increase to US$4.2 billion. Embraer delivered 75 aircraft in 4Q24, a 27% increase from 3Q24. In 2024, they delivered a total of 206 aircraft, a 14% increase from 2023. Executive Aviation deliveries were at 130 aircraft, and Commercial Aviation deliveries were at 73 aircraft in 2024. Defense & Security had three deliveries in 2024.

news.headline: Capital Clean Energy (NASDAQ: CCEC) Q4 earnings beat estimates with EPS of $0.36, a 3.0% increase. Full details on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: On Thursday, February 6, 2025, Capital Clean Energy (NASDAQ:CCEC) disclosed its Q4 earnings report at 07:30 AM. The company exceeded projected earnings by 3.0%, revealing an EPS of $0.36. Investors can find further details on the announcement at Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Malaysia construction industry output up 15% in 2024, driven by energy, infrastructure sectors. Forecasted growth until 2028.
news.summary: Report from ResearchAndMarkets.com indicates that the construction market in Malaysia experienced significant growth, with a 15% increase in real terms in 2024. This growth was driven by higher investments from both public and private sectors in energy and infrastructure projects. The market analysis, covering commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential sectors, forecasts trends up to 2028. The report provides valuable insights into the market size and potential opportunities for stakeholders.

news.headline: UK construction industry output contracted by 0.7% in 2024 due to inflation, rising material costs, and energy prices. Forecast to 2028.
news.summary: A recent report titled "The UK Construction Market Size, Trends, and Forecasts by Sector" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The UK construction industry is projected to experience a 0.7% contraction in real terms in 2024. This decline is attributed to factors such as high inflation, increasing construction material costs, rising energy prices, and notable weaknesses in the residential sector. The report provides insights into various sectors including Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional, and Residential markets, analyzing trends up to 2028 in Q4 of 2024. This analysis offers a comprehensive overview of the construction market in the UK.

news.headline: The White House calls for input on AI policy - Axios.
TGH received $2.5M gift for Bekki and Mike Haggard Endowed Chair in Innovation to boost research and education in Transplant Institute.
news.summary: A notable donation has been received by the Tampa General Hospital (TGH) Foundation, establishing the Bekki and Mike Haggard Endowed Chair in Innovation on Feb. 6, 2025. This endowment aims to support advanced research and educational initiatives at the TGH Transplant Institute, marking a significant step towards promoting innovation in healthcare. This generous contribution will play an essential role in furthering cutting-edge developments in the field.

news.headline: JM Test Systems announces Andrew Treanor as new CEO, succeeding Scott Morrison. Founded 43 years ago, Ed Morrison saw need for reliable vendors in test equipment.
news.summary: JM Test Systems, a premier test equipment and calibration services provider based in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, has appointed Andrew Treanor as its new Chief Executive Officer. Treanor takes over from previous CEO Scott Morrison, who will now serve as the Executive Chairman focusing on the company's strategic direction. Established almost 43 years ago by Ed Morrison, JM Test is known for its exceptional service, quality, and accuracy in the industry.

news.headline: Angel Lange appointed as CFO of Agiloft, leading CLM company. Position to guide growth phase. Date: Feb. 6, 2025.
news.summary: Experienced finance professional Angel Lange has been appointed as the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) of Agiloft, a leading provider of contract lifecycle management solutions based in Redwood City, California. The company made this announcement on February 6, 2025. Agiloft, known for its innovative data-first approach to CLM, is seeking to leverage Lange's expertise to navigate its growth trajectory in the upcoming phase.

news.headline: Sonida Senior Living, Inc. to participate in Morgan Stanley's 8th Annual CRE Conference with CEO and CFO attending. $SNDA.
news.summary: In Dallas, Sonida Senior Living, Inc. (NYSE: SNDA) shared that its top executives, including President & CEO Brandon Ribar, CFO Kevin Detz, and CIO Max Levy, will be part of Morgan Stanley’s Annual Commercial Real Estate Conference on February 19th and 20th in New York City. Sonida is a prominent player in senior living communities, involved in ownership, operation, and investment in this sector. The conference at Morgan Stanley Headquarters is expected to be an important platform for discussions and networking in the real estate space.

news.headline: Thompson Thrift to develop 312-unit luxury multifamily community named Velara in Nocatee near Jacksonville.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida on February 6, 2025, Thompson Thrift, a reputable real estate firm and a top multifamily developer in the country, revealed plans to construct Velara. This Class A multifamily community will consist of 312 units and will be located in Ponte Vedra.

news.headline: Tesla and BYD Competitor Report by ResearchAndMarkets.com compares both companies' strategies, financials, and innovations.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Competitor Series - Tesla vs BYD" is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report delves into the strategies of Tesla and BYD in the realms of sustainable mobility and energy technology. It provides insights into their corporate profiles, financial performance, ICT budgets, global strategies, and value propositions. Tesla is at the forefront, focusing on AI-driven autonomy and solar-integrated technologies, while BYD excels in battery innovation, energy management, and regenerative solutions. This comprehensive analysis offers a detailed comparison between the two companies' approaches in shaping the future of the industry.

news.headline: Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI) to present at Citi's 2025 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference in Miami Beach, Florida.
news.summary: In Cork, Ireland on February 6, 2025, Johnson Controls International plc, a leading global company focusing on smart, healthy, and sustainable buildings, will be participating in the Citi's 2025 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference in Miami Beach, Florida. The company's Executive Vice President will be representing them at the conference. Johnson Controls International plc is listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) under the ticker symbol JCI.

news.headline: P2P Group Ltd. (CSE: PPB) to change name to "Inturai Ventures Corp." reflecting expansion into AI.
news.summary: Investor@p2p-group.com located in Vancouver, BC, on Feb. 6, 2025, P2P Group Ltd. (known as "P2P") revealed plans to rebrand as Inturai Ventures Corp. The company, with stock tickers CSE: PPB and FSE: 3QG, is shifting focus towards AI-powered intelligent spaces. The rebrand signifies its venture into this new sector, showcasing the company's evolution in a dynamic market landscape.

news.headline: TruVista partners with GOCare to enhance customer experiences and operations. GOCare offers digital solutions for broadband providers.
news.summary: A prominent regional broadband operator is enhancing customer connections and improving efficiency with the adoption of the GOCare Digital Experience Platform. The company, based in Alpharetta, Georgia, made the decision on February 6, 2025. GOCare, known for offering innovative software as a service (SaaS) solutions for digital customer experiences, is helping broadband service providers streamline operations and strengthen relationships with their customers through this platform.

news.headline: Parks Associates announces 2025 events: Smart Energy Summit at DISTRIBUTECH and CONNECTIONS™. 55% US households value energy insights.
news.summary: In Dallas on February 6, 2025, the market research firm Parks Associates revealed that 55% of households in the US with internet access consider disaggregated energy insights to be beneficial. They also disclosed plans for the 16th Smart Energy Summit: Engaging the Consumer, to be held alongside DISTRIBUTECH.

news.headline: ConocoPhillips surpasses revenue and EPS estimates in Q4, targets $10B return of capital. Revenue $14.74B, EPS $1.98, cash flow $20.1B in 2024. Repurchased $5.5B shares, $3.6B dividends in 2024. Company produced 2,183 MBOED.
news.summary: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) stocks are up after the release of their fourth-quarter results, with revenue hitting $14.74 billion, surpassing the expected $14.30 billion. The adjusted EPS was $1.98, exceeding the anticipated $1.84. Operating cash flow for 2024 was reported at $20.1 billion. In the same year, the company repurchased $5.5 billion in shares and $3.6 billion via dividends and cash returns. As of the close of the year, ConocoPhillips held $6.4 billion in cash and short-term investments and $1.1 billion in long-term investments. Production figures indicated the company generated 2,183 thousand barrels of oil equivalent per day, showing a 281 MBOED increase year-over-year.

news.headline: Energy Toolbase, BYD, and GenPro install 3 energy storage systems at a Gering, Nebraska manufacturing facility for optimized energy savings.
news.summary: In Gering, Nebraska, in February 6, 2025, Energy Toolbase, BYD, and GenPro Energy Solutions collaborated to set up three energy storage systems at a local manufacturing facility. This marks Energy Toolbase's initial venture into energy storage projects in the state.

news.headline: Coherent Corp. beats Q2 estimates with earnings of 95 cents/share and sales of $1.44 billion. Analysts increase forecasts.
news.summary: Coherent Corp. (NYSE:COHR) exceeded expectations with its second-quarter financial results, showcasing quarterly earnings of 95 cents per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of 69 cents per share. Additionally, the company reported quarterly sales of $1.44 billion, outperforming the analyst consensus of $1.37 billion. Jim Anderson, the CEO, highlighted the strong growth in the December quarter both sequentially and year-over-year, leading to record revenue. This growth was attributed to robust demand in AI-related data centers and expansion in the Telecom business. The company also achieved notable improvement in gross margin.

news.headline: Capital Clean Energy (NASDAQ:CCEC) exceeded earnings expectations by 3%, with an EPS of $0.36 in Q4 2025.
news.summary: On Thursday, February 6, 2025 at 07:30 AM, Capital Clean Energy (NASDAQ:CCEC) released its fourth-quarter earnings report. The company exceeded expected earnings by 3.0%, achieving an EPS of $0.36. More information can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Peabody Energy (NYSE:BTU) reports Q4 earnings, missing estimates by -32% with EPS of $0.25.
news.summary: Peabody Energy, traded on NYSE under BTU, released its Q4 earnings on Thursday, February 6, 2025, at 07:45 AM. The company fell short of expected earnings by -32.0%, with an EPS of $0.25 compared to projections. For more detailed information, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: inDrive: 2nd most downloaded ride-hailing app globally for 3rd year in a row; 6.1M downloads in a month.
news.summary: In Mountain View, California, inDrive, a worldwide mobility and urban services platform available in 48 countries, has been recognized as the second most downloaded ride-hailing app globally. This achievement marks the third consecutive year of significant growth for inDrive in 2024. Market intelligence firm Sensor Tower revealed that inDrive additionally secured the fifth position in global downloads within the travel app category. Impressively, the inDrive app amassed over 6.1 million downloads within a month.

news.headline: European firms like Orsted and Equinor hit obstacles in green energy push as they slow offshore wind projects amid challenges.
news.summary: Denmark's Orsted and Norway's Equinor have decided to slow down their offshore wind development efforts following setbacks and changes in the market landscape. The decision comes as a response to challenges faced by the companies in recent times. Orsted has postponed some of its projects, while Equinor is reevaluating its strategy in light of current market conditions. This shift in approach indicates a more cautious outlook towards offshore wind development. The offshore wind giants are taking a step back to reassess their plans and adapt to the evolving industry dynamics.

news.headline: Hemanth Vedagarbha joins Firebolt as President to oversee global expansion and customer-facing operations.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, Firebolt, the Data Warehouse for AI applications, has appointed Hemanth Vedagarbha as its inaugural President. Vedagarbha will lead all go-to-market (GTM) and customer-facing departments, such as Sales, Customer Success, Marketing, Business Development, Field Engineering, Technical Support, Revenue Operations, and Partnerships & Ecosystems, as the company expands its global market footprint. This move comes as Firebolt aims to bolster its position in the industry and accelerate growth.

news.headline: NW Medical Arts in University Place, Wash., to host second annual kindness celebration, Feb. 16-22, 2025, continuing the success of previous campaign.
news.summary: A renowned medical spa located in University Place, Washington will be hosting a week-long Kindness Campaign from February 16 to 22, 2025. Following the positive reception received during the previous year’s Pierce County Kindness Campaign, Northwest Medical Arts is excited to launch its second annual kindness celebration in February. The event will be held from the 16th to the 22nd and aims to promote acts of kindness within the community.

news.headline: Patricia Nash Designs celebrates 15th anniversary in NYC with exclusive pre-NYFW event at il Buco Alimentari & Vineria.
news.summary: A renowned handbag brand marked a significant achievement by unveiling fresh collections, a revamped brand image, and a homage to enduring craftsmanship in an extravagant event in New York on February 6, 2025. Patricia Nash Designs, acclaimed for its luxurious handbags, commemorated its 15th anniversary with a showcase of new products and a renewed visual identity. The celebration highlighted the brand's unwavering commitment to timeless artistry and style.

news.headline: Diebold Nixdorf to hold 2025 Investor Day on Feb 26 in NYC from 9:00 a.m. - 11:30 a.m. ET. (source: PRNewswire)
news.summary: Diebold Nixdorf, a renowned company revolutionizing the banking and retail experience globally, disclosed plans to hold its 2025 Investor Day on February 26, 2025, in New York City. The event is scheduled to run from 9:00 a.m. to 11:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Noted as a leader in the industry, Diebold Nixdorf is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol DBD.

news.headline: Lucas Paiva, Founder and CEO of Ezpag, is changing US credit market with AI, solving industry challenges.
news.summary: In Miami on February 6, 2025, Lucas Paiva, the CEO of Ezpag, is transforming the US credit market through cutting-edge artificial intelligence strategies. Paiva's company has successfully tackled a major industry hurdle by providing solutions for granting...

news.headline: Stretto launches legal claims administration services in Irvine, California on Feb. 6, 2025. Aiming to serve wider professionals.
news.summary: A respected firm in legal and technology services, Stretto from Irvine, California, is expanding its legal claims administration services to cater to a wider clientele of legal and financial professionals starting from February 6, 2025. This move showcases their expertise in serving the market with innovative solutions.

news.headline: Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI) to present at Barclays 42nd Annual Industrial Select Conference in Miami Beach, Florida.
news.summary: In Cork, Ireland on February 6, 2025, Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE: JCI), a top player in smart and sustainable buildings, is scheduled to speak at the Barclays 42nd Annual Industrial Select Conference in Miami Beach, Florida. An Executive Vice President and Chief Officer will represent the company at this event.
